description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden full stock. The barrel is round and features a front sight, with a tubular magazine running beneath it. The receiver and lever mechanism are made of metal, with the lever loop clearly visible below the trigger guard. The stock and fore-end are crafted from wood, showing a natural brown finish with visible grain patterns. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses the trigger, providing protection and a comfortable grip. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of traditional lever-action firearms used for hunting or sport shooting.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long blued barrel, wooden full stock, and a rounded trigger guard. Features a visible lever loop and classic hunting firearm design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and lever mechanism.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the circular profile of the barrel and the alignment of the tubular magazine beneath it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, receiver, and lever, mirroring the details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the narrow profile of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, round, with a tubular magazine beneath and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
